content:
# Internal: Credit Card Application User Tool Doc

## When to Use apply_for_credit_card
Use apply_for_credit_card only when the customer is ready to submit a Northstar Bank credit-card application. This is a customer-side action: the requestor is user, so the assistant grants or directs the tool for the customer rather than simulating the call. The tool records a new application and is not a product-comparison or recommendation mechanism. See "Credit Card Product Catalog Overview" and "Internal: Credit Card Recommendation Policy" before guiding a customer who has not selected a card.

## Required Application Inputs
Collect each required argument before the customer uses the tool:

- card_type
- customer_name
- annual_income
- rho_bank_subscription

Do not substitute a card tier, customer identity, income amount, or subscription answer from assumptions. If any item is missing or ambiguous, ask one focused question and wait for the customer response before continuing.

## Tool Operation Notes
The documented tool name is apply_for_credit_card. Its action type is WRITE. Because it changes application records, use it only after the customer has provided the full argument set and confirmed the application intent. Product fees, APRs, rewards, and tier-specific terms are not defined here; see "Credit Card Fee Apr Rewards Matrix" or the relevant card terms article when the customer asks about those details before applying.
title: Internal: Credit Card Application User Tool Doc
